title: Perpignan, Occitanie — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Perpignan, Occitanie: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Perpignan is a city in Occitanie with a population of 122,000. The sunniest city in France near the Spanish border, with a unique Catalan culture, historic center, and Mediterranean beaches.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
